summary: Replace open-palm clicking with a smaller thumb-open transition and force modifier-free left clicks.
scope: Click after a stable index pointer by opening only the thumb for 120ms.
Keep pointer eligibility and the yellow index marker independent from thumb state, with 350ms transition tolerance.
Freeze the click at the last stable indexTip and require the thumb to fold before another click.
Use a private Core Graphics event source with empty flags to prevent accidental Command-click behavior.
Keep ordinary open-palm swipes dedicated to page navigation.
validation: swift test passed 31 tests including thumb-open geometry, transition tolerance, click stability, one-shot consumption and open-palm separation
GestureControlCoreChecks passed 22 checks and all 32 Web regression tests passed
TypeScript typecheck and Swift warnings-as-errors build passed
Release build, strict codesign and installed 0.8.1 build 15 checks passed
Installed UI confirmed the thumb-click instruction, permissions remained allowed and MediaPipe GPU reached ready state
notes: Final YouTube current-page behavior remains a physical-hand acceptance test.
